robots_txt.details: robots.txt properly configured. Allow: /, /_next/. Blocks /api/, /admin/, /tmp/. Sitemap declared.

sitemap_xml.details: sitemap.xml contains 408 URLs matching expectations. Properly formatted with lastmod, changefreq, priority.
issues: All article URLs share the same lastmod date (2026-02-17) rather than actual modification dates
Many URLs have priority=1.0 which dilutes the signal - should differentiate between page importance

status_codes.details: All 30 sampled URLs returned HTTP 200. No 404s, 302s, or 5xx errors found among sitemap URLs.

redirect_handling.details: HTTP->HTTPS redirect works (301). Non-trailing-slash URLs redirect to trailing-slash (301) correctly. 26 legacy URL redirects in firebase.json are all 301.
issues: www subdomain returns no response (000) - www.calculatecreator.com is unreachable rather than redirecting to non-www
Double-slash URLs (/calculators/tiktok-money//) return 307 instead of 301, creating potential crawl confusion

broken_resources.details: logo.png referenced in multiple JSON-LD schemas returns 404.
issues: CRITICAL: https://calculatecreator.com/logo.png returns 404 - referenced in publisher.logo across ALL Article and Organization schemas site-wide (affects 200+ pages)

response_times.details: TTFB ranges 134-328ms, total load 246-451ms. Brotli compression enabled (117KB -> 12KB compressed).

title_tags.details: Homepage title is good (84 chars but informative). Calculator page titles have poor patterns.
issues: CRITICAL: Calculator titles use templated format 'TikTok {Slug} Calculator and Earnings Tool Guide' - keyword-stuffed and unnatural (e.g., 'TikTok Tiktok Money Calculator and Earnings Tool Guide')
Title tag capitalization issues: 'Tiktok Money' instead of 'TikTok Money' - slug is being title-cased without proper brand casing
Many calculator titles exceed 60 chars or are generic/repetitive across pages
News page titles use pattern 'TikTok {slug} News and Creator Update' - slug-derived, not human-written
MDX article titles are better but some have keyword-first pattern: 'tiktok earnings per views - Average TikTok Earnings Per 1K' (lowercase keyword prefix)

meta_descriptions.details: Templated descriptions across page types lack uniqueness and CTAs.
issues: Calculator descriptions all follow pattern: 'Use this TikTok {slug} calculator to estimate earnings, engagement, and monetization outcomes...' - nearly identical across 35+ calculators
MDX article descriptions repeat headline then add boilerplate: '{Headline}. {keyword} with data, benchmarks, and expert analysis. Includes benchmarks, monetization' - double 'benchmarks'
Several descriptions are truncated mid-sentence (e.g., 'Includes benchmarks,' ending with comma)
Homepage meta description is 170 chars - exceeds 155-char best practice
News pages all share same boilerplate description pattern

canonical_tags.details: All sampled pages have self-referencing canonical tags. Proper absolute URLs with trailing slashes.
issues: Minor: canonical uses consistent trailing-slash format, matching sitemap - good

og_tags.details: Significant og:url and og:title inheritance issues across multiple page types.
issues: CRITICAL: All 20+ news pages inherit layout default OG tags - og:url points to homepage, og:title says 'CalculateCreator - Creator Benchmarks and Calculators', og:description is generic
CRITICAL: All 7 comparison pages inherit default OG tags - og:url points to homepage
CRITICAL: Calculator pages (tiktok-money, engagement-rate, coins, brand-deal-rate) have og:url pointing to /calculators/ instead of their own URL
Reference, about, faq, glossary pages all inherit default og:url pointing to homepage
Homepage is missing og:image in its page-level metadata (only set in layout default)
Total estimated affected pages: 80-100+ pages with wrong og:url

twitter_cards.details: Twitter cards present on pages that set metadata, but many pages inherit generic defaults.
issues: News, comparison, reference, and utility pages inherit generic twitter:title 'CalculateCreator' instead of page-specific titles
All pages use the same hero-dashboard image for twitter:image - no page-specific social images

robots_meta.details: Pages that set robots meta use 'index, follow' with proper googlebot directives for max-snippet and max-image-preview.
issues: Some pages (older calculators) do not explicitly set robots meta, relying on layout default which is fine

viewport.details: All pages have viewport meta tag: width=device-width, initial-scale=1

homepage_schema.details: HomepageSchema component exists in codebase but is NEVER imported or rendered on the homepage.
issues: CRITICAL: Homepage has ZERO JSON-LD structured data. HomepageSchema component at src/components/seo/HomepageSchema.tsx defines Organization, WebSite, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, ItemList, and CollectionPage schemas but is not imported in src/app/page.tsx
Missing WebSite schema with SearchAction on homepage - important for sitelinks searchbox in SERPs
Missing Organization schema on homepage - important for Knowledge Panel

calculator_schemas.details: Calculator pages have SoftwareApplication, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, and Person schemas. Well-structured.
issues: Publisher logo URL (logo.png) returns 404 - invalid ImageObject reference
Rating values may trigger Google manual review - ensure reviews are legitimate

article_schemas.details: MDX articles and blog posts have Article/BreadcrumbList/Person schemas. Guides use Article schema correctly.
issues: Some articles use 'Person' type for 'CalculateCreator Team' - should be Organization
Publisher logo URL (logo.png) returns 404 across all Article schemas
datePublished and dateModified are identical on most articles - should reflect actual edit dates

news_schemas.details: News pages use NewsArticle schema type with proper headline, dates, and author information.
issues: Publisher logo 404 issue applies here too
News article images reference /news/ directory images that do exist - good

comparison_schemas.details: Comparison pages have Article, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, and ComparisonTable schemas.
issues: ComparisonTable is not a standard schema.org type - may not be recognized by Google
datePublished shows 2024-11-01 and dateModified 2025-11-15 - potentially stale

collection_schemas.details: Category/hub pages use CollectionPage, ItemList, FAQPage, and BreadcrumbList schemas.

link_density.details: Pages average 30-60 internal links. Homepage has ~55-60. Article pages have 25-40. Good coverage.

navigation_structure.details: Header navigation is minimal (Guides, News, Search, Run Estimate). Footer has comprehensive links.
issues: Header nav only has 4 links - missing direct links to Calculators, Data, Blog, Comparisons sections
No mega menu or dropdown navigation despite having 35+ calculator pages
Blog index, Data section, and Comparisons section not in primary navigation

breadcrumbs.details: Breadcrumbs present on all content pages with proper hierarchy. Both visual and JSON-LD breadcrumbs match.
issues: Homepage breadcrumb only has 'Home' - correct behavior

contextual_links.details: Article pages include contextual links to related calculators, guides, and data pages within body content.
issues: Some CTA links have double-slash URLs (e.g., /calculators/tiktok-money// or /calculators/niche-profitability//) which redirect via 307
Related content sections could be more dynamic based on content relationships

orphan_pages.details: Some sections have limited incoming links from other content.
issues: Localized calculator pages (/calculator/de/, /calculator/es/, etc.) have minimal internal links from English content
No hreflang tags connecting English and localized versions
Some deep data pages (country-specific earnings) may have limited inbound links beyond the data hub

link_depth.details: Most content is within 3 clicks from homepage. Some article sub-pages are 4 clicks deep.
issues: Calculator article pages (e.g., /calculators/tiktok-money/tiktok-pay-per-1000-views/) are 4 levels deep
Some data pages with country specifics are 4 levels deep

ttfb.details: Time to First Byte: 134-328ms across sampled pages. Well within the 800ms good threshold.

page_size.details: Page sizes are large for a static site. Homepage: 115KB, Calculator pages: 166-190KB, Blog: 109KB (uncompressed HTML).
issues: Calculator pages approaching 190KB uncompressed HTML - significant for mobile users
Earnings-revenue calculator page is 190KB - the largest sampled
Large JS bundles visible in HTML: multiple async script chunks loaded on every page

compression.details: Brotli compression enabled. Homepage compressed from 117KB to 12KB (~90% reduction).

caching.details: Good caching strategy: static assets immutable/1yr, calculators/guides 24hr, news 1hr, HTML must-revalidate.
issues: Homepage cache-control is 'max-age=3600' (1hr) rather than matching the calculator pattern of 86400 (24hr)
Blog pages have 'max-age=3600' instead of 86400 - inconsistent with guides

font_loading.details: Two fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk) loaded via next/font with display:swap and preload. WOFF2 format.
issues: Two font families increase total font weight. Consider if Space Grotesk is necessary for all pages

render_blocking.details: Multiple CSS files loaded synchronously. JS loaded with async attribute.
issues: Two CSS files loaded with data-precedence (render-blocking by nature)
Service worker registration script runs on every page via afterInteractive strategy
DNS prefetch for Google Analytics and GTM even though no GA/GTM scripts visible in layout

pagespeed_api.details: PageSpeed Insights API quota exceeded during testing. Unable to obtain Lighthouse scores.
issues: Could not verify LCP, FID/INP, CLS metrics via API - manual PageSpeed Insights testing recommended

formats.details: Hero/OG image uses WebP format (hero-dashboard-1600.webp). News images use WebP.
issues: Logo image (calculate-creator-transparent-v2.png) is still PNG rather than WebP/AVIF

alt_text.details: Very few actual tags in content - mostly SVG icons with aria-hidden. Logo has alt text.
issues: Article bodies contain NO inline images at all - purely text content with SVG icons
No featured images on articles (only the generic OG image)
The OG image is the same hero-dashboard-1600.webp on every page - no unique social sharing images

dimensions.details: Logo tag lacks explicit width/height attributes, risking CLS.
issues: Logo image in 404 page and wherever used lacks width/height attributes
OG meta images declare 1200x630 correctly

lazy_loading.details: No lazy loading attributes found on tags. Limited images make this less impactful.
issues: No loading='lazy' attributes on any detected tags
Since there are very few images, impact is low but should still be implemented

viewport.details: Proper viewport meta tag on all pages: width=device-width, initial-scale=1

responsive_design.details: Tailwind CSS responsive utilities used throughout. Font display:swap prevents FOIT.
issues: Large page sizes (190KB) may impact mobile load times on slow connections

touch_targets.details: Navigation links and CTAs appear appropriately sized based on code analysis.
issues: Unable to fully verify without visual testing - recommend Lighthouse mobile audit

font_sizes.details: Inter (body) and Space Grotesk (display) with proper sizing via Tailwind.

hsts.details: Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload - excellent configuration.

csp.details: CSP present but allows unsafe-inline and unsafe-eval for scripts.
issues: script-src includes 'unsafe-inline' and 'unsafe-eval' - weakens CSP protection significantly
Consider using nonces or hashes instead of unsafe-inline

referrer_policy.details: Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin - good balance of privacy and analytics.

permissions_policy.details: Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=() - restricts unnecessary APIs.

www_redirect.details: www.calculatecreator.com returns no response - not configured.
issues: www subdomain is unreachable (connection refused) instead of redirecting to non-www canonical

heading_hierarchy.details: Single H1 per page. MDX body H1s automatically demoted to H2 via component override. Proper H2/H3 hierarchy.
issues: Some H1 tags match title tags exactly - slight differentiation would be beneficial

content_length.details: Article pages have substantial content. Calculator pages combine tool UI with educational content.

hreflang.details: Site has 6 localized calculator pages (/calculator/de/, /es/, /fr/, /it/, /my/, /pt-br/) but NO hreflang tags.
issues: CRITICAL: No hreflang tags connecting English and localized versions. Google may treat these as duplicate content or fail to serve the right version
Localized pages need hreflang annotations pointing to all language variants including x-default

language_attributes.details: HTML lang='en' is set globally. Localized pages (/calculator/de/, /calculator/es/) also render with lang='en'.
issues: Localized calculator pages should have appropriate lang attributes (de, es, fr, it, ms, pt-BR) but all use lang='en'

structured_content.details: Good use of semantic HTML. Tables, lists, and data are properly structured. FAQ sections use accordion pattern.

issues_found.title: Homepage has zero JSON-LD structured data
issues_found.description: HomepageSchema component exists at src/components/seo/HomepageSchema.tsx but is never imported or rendered in src/app/page.tsx. The homepage is missing Organization, WebSite (with SearchAction), FAQPage, ItemList, CollectionPage, and BreadcrumbList schemas.
issues_found.impact: Missing sitelinks searchbox, Knowledge Panel signals, and FAQ rich results for the homepage - the most important page on the site.
issues_found.fix: Add 'import { HomepageSchema } from "@/components/seo/HomepageSchema"' to src/app/page.tsx and render <HomepageSchema /> in the component.

issues_found.title: 80-100+ pages have wrong og:url pointing to homepage
issues_found.description: Pages that don't explicitly set openGraph metadata in their page.tsx inherit the layout.tsx defaults, causing og:url to point to https://calculatecreator.com/ instead of the actual page URL. Affected sections: all news pages (~20), all comparison pages (~7), calculator pages inheriting from calculators/layout.tsx (~15), reference pages, utility pages, about, faq, glossary, etc.
issues_found.impact: Social shares point to wrong URL. Facebook/LinkedIn will show homepage content instead of the shared page. Potential negative signal for social crawlers.
issues_found.fix: Either (1) remove the og:url from layout.tsx defaults so Next.js can auto-resolve, or (2) add explicit openGraph metadata with correct URL to each page/layout that doesn't have it. News and comparison pages need the most urgent attention.

issues_found.title: Publisher logo (logo.png) returns 404 - referenced in all schemas
issues_found.description: https://calculatecreator.com/logo.png returns HTTP 404. This URL is referenced as the publisher.logo.url in Article, NewsArticle, and Organization schemas across the entire site.
issues_found.impact: Google may show warnings in Search Console for invalid publisher logo. Could affect article rich results eligibility.
issues_found.fix: Create and deploy logo.png to the public/ directory (or update schema references to use the existing /images/calculate-creator-transparent-v2.png).

issues_found.title: Calculator page titles are templated and unnatural
issues_found.description: Calculator pages use auto-generated titles like 'TikTok Tiktok Money Calculator and Earnings Tool Guide' - note the double 'TikTok Tiktok' from slug title-casing. Pattern is keyword-stuffed and repetitive across 35+ pages.
issues_found.impact: Poor CTR in SERPs due to unnatural titles. Google may rewrite titles. Double 'TikTok' looks unprofessional.
issues_found.fix: Write unique, human-readable titles for each calculator page. Fix the title-casing function to not capitalize brand names from slugs (tiktok-money -> 'Tiktok Money' should be 'TikTok Money').

issues_found.title: Meta descriptions are templated and near-identical across page types
issues_found.description: Calculator pages all share 'Use this TikTok {slug} calculator to estimate earnings...' pattern. MDX articles use '{Headline}. {keyword} with data, benchmarks, and expert analysis. Includes benchmarks, monetization' - note 'benchmarks' appears twice. Some descriptions truncated mid-sentence.
issues_found.impact: Google may ignore duplicate descriptions and generate its own. Missed opportunity for unique CTAs and click-through optimization.
issues_found.fix: Write unique meta descriptions for each page type. Fix the normalizeSeoDescription function in article-page.tsx to avoid doubling 'benchmarks'. Ensure descriptions don't truncate mid-sentence.

issues_found.title: Localized pages have no hreflang tags and wrong lang attribute
issues_found.description: Six localized calculator pages (/calculator/de/, /es/, /fr/, /it/, /my/, /pt-br/) exist but have no hreflang annotations and all render with html lang='en' instead of their respective languages.
issues_found.impact: Google cannot determine language targeting. May treat as duplicate content. Wrong language served to users in search results.
issues_found.fix: Add hreflang link tags to both the English and localized pages. Update html lang attribute for each localized page.

issues_found.title: www subdomain is unreachable instead of redirecting
issues_found.description: https://www.calculatecreator.com returns connection refused (000 status). Should redirect to non-www canonical.
issues_found.impact: Users typing www. will see an error page. Any backlinks to www version are wasted link equity.
issues_found.fix: Configure DNS and Firebase Hosting to handle www subdomain with 301 redirect to non-www.

issues_found.title: Internal links contain double-slash URLs
issues_found.description: Some CTA links in content have trailing double-slashes (e.g., /calculators/tiktok-money// or /calculators/niche-profitability//). These return 307 redirects instead of 301.
issues_found.impact: Redirect chains waste crawl budget. 307 temporary redirects don't pass full link equity.
issues_found.fix: Find and fix all double-slash hrefs in page content. Search for '//' in href attributes across components.

issues_found.title: Some calculator pages have og:url pointing to parent /calculators/
issues_found.description: tiktok-money, engagement-rate, coins, and brand-deal-rate calculator pages have og:url set to https://calculatecreator.com/calculators/ instead of their own URL. This comes from the calculators/layout.tsx inheriting parent openGraph.
issues_found.impact: Social shares from these top calculator pages point to the wrong URL.
issues_found.fix: Update calculators/layout.tsx to not set og:url, or set each calculator page's og:url explicitly.

issues_found.title: Homepage page-level metadata missing og:image
issues_found.description: The homepage's page-specific openGraph metadata in src/app/page.tsx doesn't include an images array. It relies on layout.tsx default which does include it, but the page override may strip it in some Next.js versions.
issues_found.impact: Social shares of the homepage may lack the preview image on some platforms.
issues_found.fix: Add images array to the openGraph object in src/app/page.tsx metadata.

issues_found.title: Calculator pages have large HTML sizes (166-190KB)
issues_found.description: Uncompressed HTML for calculator pages ranges from 166KB to 190KB. While Brotli compression reduces transfer size significantly, the DOM size may impact parsing and rendering performance.
issues_found.impact: Slower mobile rendering, increased TBT, potential INP issues on lower-end devices.
issues_found.fix: Audit calculator page components for unnecessary DOM elements. Consider lazy-loading FAQ sections and below-fold content.

issues_found.title: All pages share the same OG/social sharing image
issues_found.description: Every page on the site uses hero-dashboard-1600.webp as the og:image and twitter:image. No page-specific social images.
issues_found.impact: All social shares look identical. Reduced click-through from social platforms. No visual differentiation between shared pages.
issues_found.fix: Generate unique OG images per page or at least per page type (calculator, guide, blog, data, news).

issues_found.title: Header navigation only has 4 links
issues_found.description: Primary navigation contains only Guides, News, Search, and Run Estimate. Missing direct links to Calculators, Blog, Data, Comparisons - the site's main content sections.
issues_found.impact: Important sections are harder to discover. Reduced crawl efficiency for these sections. Users may not find relevant content.
issues_found.fix: Add Calculators, Blog, and Data sections to primary navigation. Consider a mega menu for the 35+ calculators.

issues_found.title: Many sitemap URLs have priority=1.0
issues_found.description: Multiple URLs in sitemap.xml have priority=1.0 including article pages. Priority should differentiate between page importance (homepage=1.0, category=0.8, articles=0.6).
issues_found.impact: Diluted priority signal. Google largely ignores priority values but it's a best practice to differentiate.
issues_found.fix: Update scripts/generate-sitemap.js to assign appropriate priority values based on page type.

issues_found.title: CSP allows unsafe-inline and unsafe-eval
issues_found.description: Content-Security-Policy script-src includes 'unsafe-inline' and 'unsafe-eval', significantly weakening XSS protection.
issues_found.impact: Reduced security posture. Not an SEO issue directly but affects trust signals.
issues_found.fix: Migrate to nonce-based CSP. This requires changes to how inline scripts are handled across the site.

top_10_priority_fixes.title: Import and render HomepageSchema on the homepage
top_10_priority_fixes.impact: High - enables sitelinks searchbox, Organization Knowledge Panel, FAQ rich results on homepage

top_10_priority_fixes.title: Fix og:url inheritance so every page has its own URL
top_10_priority_fixes.impact: Critical - 80-100+ pages currently point social shares to homepage instead of actual content

top_10_priority_fixes.title: Deploy logo.png or update schema references
top_10_priority_fixes.impact: High - fixes broken publisher logo across 300+ schema instances

top_10_priority_fixes.title: Fix calculator page title generation (double TikTok, keyword stuffing)
top_10_priority_fixes.impact: High - improves CTR for 35+ key money pages with 'TikTok Tiktok' bug
top_10_priority_fixes.file: Calculator layout.tsx files and metadata generators

top_10_priority_fixes.title: Fix meta description template to avoid doubling 'benchmarks' and truncation
top_10_priority_fixes.impact: Medium - affects 200+ pages with near-identical or broken descriptions

top_10_priority_fixes.title: Add hreflang tags and correct lang attributes for localized pages
top_10_priority_fixes.impact: Medium - 6 localized pages need proper international targeting

top_10_priority_fixes.title: Configure www subdomain to redirect to non-www
top_10_priority_fixes.impact: Medium - recovers lost traffic and link equity from www URLs

top_10_priority_fixes.title: Fix double-slash internal links in CTA buttons
top_10_priority_fixes.impact: Medium - eliminates 307 redirect chains from internal navigation
top_10_priority_fixes.file: Various component files with href attributes

top_10_priority_fixes.title: Fix calculator pages og:url pointing to /calculators/ parent
top_10_priority_fixes.impact: Medium - top calculator pages' social shares go to wrong URL

top_10_priority_fixes.title: Add og:image to homepage page-level metadata
top_10_priority_fixes.impact: Low-medium - ensures homepage social shares always have preview image

tools_used: curl (HTTP headers, status codes, response times)
methodology.pagespeed_status: API quota exceeded - unable to run Lighthouse
